tools.name: dataIntegrations.createDataIntegration
tools.description:
Creates and persists a DataIntegration resource.

You cannot create a DataIntegration association for a DataIntegration that has been previously associated. Use a different DataIntegration, or recreate the DataIntegration using the CreateDataIntegration API.

tools.name: dataIntegrations.deleteDataIntegration
tools.description:
Deletes the DataIntegration. Only DataIntegrations that don't have any DataIntegrationAssociations can be deleted. Deleting a DataIntegration also deletes the underlying Amazon AppFlow flow and service linked role.

You cannot create a DataIntegration association for a DataIntegration that has been previously associated. Use a different DataIntegration, or recreate the DataIntegration using the CreateDataIntegration API.

tools.name: dataIntegrations.getDataIntegration
tools.description:
Returns information about the DataIntegration.

You cannot create a DataIntegration association for a DataIntegration that has been previously associated. Use a different DataIntegration, or recreate the DataIntegration using the CreateDataIntegration API.

tools.name: dataIntegrations.listDataIntegrationAssociations
tools.description:
Returns a paginated list of DataIntegration associations in the account.

You cannot create a DataIntegration association for a DataIntegration that has been previously associated. Use a different DataIntegration, or recreate the DataIntegration using the CreateDataIntegration API.

tools.name: dataIntegrations.listDataIntegrations
tools.description:
Returns a paginated list of DataIntegrations in the account.

You cannot create a DataIntegration association for a DataIntegration that has been previously associated. Use a different DataIntegration, or recreate the DataIntegration using the CreateDataIntegration API.

tools.name: dataIntegrations.updateDataIntegration
tools.description:
Updates the description of a DataIntegration.

You cannot create a DataIntegration association for a DataIntegration that has been previously associated. Use a different DataIntegration, or recreate the DataIntegration using the CreateDataIntegration API.

tools.name: eventIntegrations.createEventIntegration
tools.description: Creates an EventIntegration, given a specified name, description, and a reference to an Amazon EventBridge bus in your account and a partner event source that pushes events to that bus. No objects are created in the your account, only metadata that is persisted on the EventIntegration control plane.

tools.name: eventIntegrations.deleteEventIntegration
tools.description: Deletes the specified existing event integration. If the event integration is associated with clients, the request is rejected.

tools.name: eventIntegrations.getEventIntegration
tools.description: Returns information about the event integration.

tools.name: eventIntegrations.listEventIntegrationAssociations
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of event integration associations in the account.

tools.name: eventIntegrations.listEventIntegrations
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of event integrations in the account.

tools.name: eventIntegrations.updateEventIntegration
tools.description: Updates the description of an event integration.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags for the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds the specified tags to the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes the specified tags from the specified resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
